response.justification: Bogdan Szabo's resume shows extensive experience in software development and leadership roles, but it lacks direct evidence of the mandatory C++ development experience on Windows platforms, SQL Server/Oracle expertise, or domain knowledge in fixed income/capital markets. His background is heavily skewed toward JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and other languages, with only limited and dated C++ exposure (e.g., National Instruments role in 2014-2015). Domain expertise is not demonstrated.
strengths: Strong software engineering fundamentals and leadership experience across multiple domains
Proven ability to work in complex, high-performance environments (e.g., micro-services at Dunnhumby)
Open-source contributions and public speaking engagements demonstrate technical depth and communication skills
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ development experience on Windows (mandatory skill)
Lacks demonstrated expertise in SQL Server/Oracle or financial domain knowledge
No evidence of fixed income, investment banking, or capital markets experience
